strategy: The guide's recommended team is two Fire wizards plus one wizard of any school. The Fire wizards are the damage dealers; the third slot is flexible support. Traps are your best friend in this fight.
Turn 1 setup: Fire wizard 1 casts Potent Backdraft, Fire wizard 2 and the third wizard each lay any Fire trap, and the Fire hitter casts Phoenix into the stacked traps.
Backdraft on a Fire wizard amplifies the trap damage enough to end the fight in one or two turns; the author's 180% damage Fire hit did about 11k against the roughly 11,040 health boss.
If you are short on Fire wizards, use your own school's traps instead and just take one extra setup turn to stack enough before the hit.

Avoid the punish cheats: Feints trigger dual Insane Bolts, DoTs prompt a Kraken removal, Juju or weakness spells trigger Hammer of Thor, and Blades or global spells provoke Enfeeble. Stick to traps plus one big hit.
Spread setup so no single wizard is the obvious Beguile target, then funnel the Backdraft-fed Phoenix (or your school's AoE) for the kill before her thralls out-heal you.
cheatNotes: Killing a thrall summons a new random-school one that wakes up two Rounds later; you cannot clear the board for good, so plan to kill her directly.
With no minions, or after being healed, she may burn her turn on Insane Bolt; a self-inflicted risk that can help you.
She Beguiles the wizard carrying the most blades; spread blades or funnel them late so no single wizard is the obvious target.
She interrupt-casts a +25% Windstorm to buff her Storm damage.
She can interrupt with a zero-pip Supercharge scaling to her pip count, powering a big follow-up.
She can cheat-cast Astraphobia on the team; keep shields up.
If Krokopatra receives a charm, the Death thrall Dark Pacts her, buffing her at a health cost.
The Death thrall may Bad Juju the wizard with the most blades; another reason not to over-stack blades on one player.
Casting a DoT makes the Life thrall Mass Triage it off the whole enemy side; skip DoTs and burst instead.
Attacking Krokopatra or a minion makes the Life thrall heal the enemy side with Unicorn; hit hard enough to out-pace it.
Attacking Krokopatra makes the Storm thrall Healing-Current her; combine kills into one big hit.
Dispelling Krokopatra or a minion makes the Storm thrall Cleanse it off; Dispels are wasted here.
